description: Sanitized pre-FT probe showing one shared Z-Space inference distortion adapter applied to local GPT-2 logits/hooks and an OpenAI Responses GPT-5 nano route.
command: PYTHONPATH=bindings/st-py python3 bindings/st-py/examples/zspace_inference_distortion_probe.py --prompt 'SpiralTorch is a Z-space runtime for language models. Explain what changes when inference is distorted by desire, psi, and coherence.' --local-model <local-gpt2-dir> --max-new-tokens 24 --activation-name-contains attn --activation-name-contains mlp --api-provider openai-responses --api-model gpt-5-nano --api-max-tokens 256 --api-reasoning-effort minimal --api-text-verbosity low --desire-pressure 0.88 --desire-stability 0.35 --psi-total 0.78 --coherence 0.42 --distortion-strength 1.15 --base-temperature 0.7 --base-top-p 0.92 --include-penalties --out runs/inference-distortion/preft-local-gpt2-openai-gpt5nano-minimal-low-probe.json

previews.local_baseline: SpiralTorch is a Z-space runtime for language models. Explain what changes when inference is distorted by desire, psi, and coherence. The Z-space runtime is a...
previews.local_distorted: SpiralTorch is a Z-space runtime for language models. Explain what changes when inference is distorted by desire, psi, and coherence. The following code snipp...
previews.api_text: In SpiralTorch, when inference is distorted by desire, psi, and coherence, the following changes occur in the Z-space telemetry and behavior: Desire-based d...

compact_lines: zspace_inference_distortion_probe local=ok changed=True backend=spiraltorch_zspace_softmax top_changes=5 activation_events=64 api=openai-responses api_dropped=4 api_retry_dropped=2 effect=0.80200758987286 risk=0.3958091022779243 energy=0.8152689249999999 temp=1.070947360875 top_p=0.68839540615

zspace_inference_distortion_local baseline='SpiralTorch is a Z-space runtime for language models. Explain what changes when inference is di...' distorted='SpiralTorch is a Z-space runtime for language models. Explain what changes when inference is di...'
zspace_inference_distortion_api text='In SpiralTorch, when inference is distorted by desire, psi, and coherence, the following change...'
notes: The local HF path used the same distortion adapter for ZSpaceRepressionLogitsProcessor and activation intervention hooks.
GPT-5 nano rejected temperature/top_p server-side, so the OpenAI adapter retried after dropping those parameters and recorded retry_dropped_keys.
The route kept visible output by sending reasoning={effort:minimal} and text={verbosity:low}.
No API key, provider response id, or local absolute model path is stored in this sample.
